title: Jaypore International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Jaypore International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Jaypore International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jaypore International Enterprises:
Jaypore International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypore International Enterprises!
